subcodes.first_line: O My Name Mihdi! The letter of Afnán, upon him be Bahá's glory, which he sent unto thee, hath reached the presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی مکتوب افنان علیه بهائی که بشما ارسال داشت عبد حاضر لدی الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
